info.title: Chihiro
info.description: Alternative command line tool for generating Umbraco models

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Umbraco Model Generator for v7, v8.

options.name: mb
options.description: Specifies the location of the .mb file - this is used as reference where other .generated.cs model files will be written

options.name: csproj
options.description: Specifies the location of the .csproj file - this will be updated with the autogenerated model files.

options.name: ns
options.description: Specifies the code namespace that autogenerated models should use

options.name: api
options.description: Specifies the Umbraco ModelsBuilder API domain name, for example: http://umbraco.local/

options.name: version
options.description: Specifies the version of Umbraco to run against.
